headline: Hugo Oliveira
body: Strasbourg confirm Hugo Oliveira has joined as head coach. BlueCo impressed by his time at Famalicão, and Oliveira has Premier League experience having worked as Marco Silva’s assistant.✍️ 🗣️ Oliveira “It is an honour to be here in Strasbourg and to join such a beautiful project, where history and ambition agree perfectly. I want to bring emotions, create memories and give the best of myself to help the club continue to grow.” Ben Jacobs (JacobsBen) 🚨 BREAKING: Hugo Oliveira is the leading candidate to take over at Strasbourg. BlueCo impressed by his job at Famalicao. Was in the running for the Fulham job and now likely to move to Ligue 1 with Strasbourg. —
raw_text:
Strasbourg confirm Hugo Oliveira has joined as head coach. BlueCo impressed by his time at Famalicão, and Oliveira has Premier League experience having worked as Marco Silva’s assistant.✍️

🗣️ Oliveira “It is an honour to be here in Strasbourg and to join such a beautiful project, where history and ambition agree perfectly. I want to bring emotions, create memories and give the best of myself to help the club continue to grow.”




Ben Jacobs (@JacobsBen)

🚨 BREAKING: Hugo Oliveira is the leading candidate to take over at Strasbourg. BlueCo impressed by his job at Famalicao. Was in the running for the Fulham job and now likely to move to Ligue 1 with Strasbourg.





— https://nitter.net/JacobsBen/status/2075391032242360501#m
